# host_group (Data Source)

Reads an existing local host group by name or by an operating-system role such as `admin`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "host_group" "admin" {
  role = "admin"
}

resource "host_user" "workstation" {
  username = "workstation"
  groups   = [data.host_group.admin.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Local group name. When `role` is set, this is resolved by the provider.
- `role` (String) Portable role to resolve. Currently only `admin` is supported. It resolves to `admin` on macOS and the first existing `wheel` or `sudo` group on Linux.

### Read-Only

- `gid` (String) Numeric group ID as reported by the operating system.
- `id` (String) Group identifier, equal to `name`.
